summary: Tested Mira Intelligence Layer 'Picks for {Pet}' feature. Backend APIs all working correctly (13/13 tests passed). Frontend labels and personalization working. Microcopy only shows when question_card is present.

issues: Microcopy 'This will refine {pet}'s picks' only shows when question_card is present (by design - not a bug)

critical_code_review_comments: Backend APIs verified working: curated-set returns correct why_for_pet for anxious pet ('calm and gentle approach')
Ticket creation working with proper member and admin notifications
Frontend correctly shows 'Concierge® Product' and 'Concierge® Service' labels
Question card microcopy 'This will refine {pet}'s picks' is implemented but only visible when question_card exists (profile is thin)
seed_data_creation: Created test tickets with TEST_ prefix during testing
context_for_next_testing_agent: Intelligence Layer for Picks feature fully tested. Backend curated-set API returns 3-5 personalized concierge cards with correct why_for_pet text based on pet traits (anxious pets get 'calm and gentle approach'). Ticket creation creates entries in service_desk_tickets, notifications, and admin_notifications collections. Frontend CuratedConciergeSection renders properly when user is logged in.

backend.anxious_pet_gets_calm_why_for_pet: PASS - Verified 'calm and gentle approach' text

frontend.microcopy_will_refine: CONDITIONAL - Only shows when question_card exists

why_for_pet_examples: Designed for Lola's calm and gentle approach
